title:
The potential of systems modelling
to inform farm decisions for higher
resilience and profit
abstract:
This Indian village in Telangana State
with 150 families was selected for
pretesting a questionnaire developed
by ICRISAT to gather data to run a
whole farm simulation model. The
Indian Council of Agricultural
Research (ICAR) is playing a key role
in this project to help farmers take
informed decisions.
funders: Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) and CRP GLDC
